targets.expr: (sum(rate(ob_sysstat{stat_id="40009",ob_cluster_name="$cluster",obzone=~"$zone",tenant_name=~"$tenant"}[$interval])) by (ob_cluster_name) + sum(rate(ob_sysstat{stat_id="40019",ob_cluster_name="$cluster",obzone=~"$zone",tenant_name=~"$tenant"}[$interval])) by (ob_cluster_name)) / (sum(rate(ob_sysstat{stat_id="40000",ob_cluster_name="$cluster",obzone=~"$zone",tenant_name=~"$tenant"}[$interval])) by (ob_cluster_name) + sum(rate(ob_sysstat{stat_id="40002",ob_cluster_name="$cluster",obzone=~"$zone",tenant_name=~"$tenant"}[$interval])) by (ob_cluster_name) + sum(rate(ob_sysstat{stat_id="40004",ob_cluster_name="$cluster",obzone=~"$zone",tenant_name=~"$tenant"}[$interval])) by (ob_cluster_name) + sum(rate(ob_sysstat{stat_id="40006",ob_cluster_name="$cluster",obzone=~"$zone",tenant_name=~"$tenant"}[$interval])) by (ob_cluster_name) + sum(rate(ob_sysstat{stat_id="40008",ob_cluster_name="$cluster",obzone=~"$zone",tenant_name=~"$tenant"}[$interval])) by (ob_cluster_name) + sum(rate(ob_sysstat{stat_id="40018",ob_cluster_name="$cluster",obzone=~"$zone",tenant_name=~"$tenant"}[$interval])) by (ob_cluster_name))
